strategies.name: raw_retained_transcript
strategies.description: append-only full transcript/tool output; cache-friendly but pays rent forever

strategies.name: adaptive_raw_then_mrc
strategies.description: keep raw append-only under 24k, then switch to KEEP/REF/DROP projection

strategies.name: rolling_model_summary
strategies.description: periodic model summary plus recent raw buffer; cheap context, lossy exact recall

strategies.name: vcc_source_view
strategies.description: raw event log as truth; deterministic source-coordinate view with expandable records

strategies.name: pi_vcc_sections
strategies.description: deterministic sections: goal, files/changes, outstanding context, preferences, brief transcript

strategies.name: pi_mrc_keep_ref_drop
strategies.description: KEEP critical facts, REF hidden evidence, DROP noise; smallest visible view with lookup burden

strategies.name: hybrid_sections_prompt_classifier
strategies.description: pi-vcc-style deterministic sections plus cheap prompt-only classifier metadata
